programme.heading: Download all proposals
programme.generate_error: There was a problem starting the download. Please try again.
programme.file_error: There was a problem downloading the file. Please try again.

empty.description: You have not generated a programme download yet. Generate a programme to download all proposals in your account as an Excel spreadsheet.
empty.why_summary: Why do I need to generate the programme?
empty.why_detail: The programme is generated on demand and includes all proposals in your assigned areas at the time of generation. Because it can take a while to build, you generate it when you need it rather than having it rebuilt automatically.

generating.heading: Generating your programme
generating.default_message: Your programme is being generated. This may take a few minutes.
generating.email_notice: You will receive an email when your programme is ready to download.

failed.title: Generation failed
failed.body: There was a problem generating the programme. Please try again. If the problem persists, contact support.

counts.heading: Current proposal counts
counts.note: Archived projects are excluded from the system-wide download.

empty.description: The complete FCERM1 for all non-archived projects has not yet been generated. Generate it to produce a single spreadsheet covering every project in the system.

ready.fcerm1_hint: Contains all non-archived proposals across every area
